summary: Comprehensive testing of Google Meet link flow fix completed. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend LiveClassroom page correctly implements phase-based flow (loading/redirecting/fallback/error), auto-redirect works, error state displays when no recitation_link is set, and fallback button uses native <a> tag with target='_blank'.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveClassroom.js correctly implements phase-based state management (loading/redirecting/fallback/error)
Auto-redirect uses window.open(link, '_self') with 100ms delay for reliable redirect
Fallback button uses native <a href={meetLink} target='_blank'> for maximum browser compatibility
URL normalization helper (normalizeUrl) correctly prepends https:// if missing
3-second timeout before showing fallback button allows redirect to complete
Error state correctly shown when teacher has no recitation_link set
No hardcoded Google Meet links in frontend source files (only placeholder text in TeacherLinkManager.jsx)
seed_data_creation: Test student user and session created for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Meet link flow fully tested. All features working: 1) GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/join-link returns teacher's CURRENT recitation_link, 2) PUT /api/admin/teacher-link updates teacher link and propagates to pending sessions, 3) LiveClassroom.js auto-redirects to Google Meet, 4) Fallback button shown after 3 seconds if redirect blocked, 5) Error state shown when no recitation_link set. Teachers: البراء السيدا (user_83f9f9a557d5, has recitation_link), عمر النجار (user_be94ca2d4ab5, no link).

verified_features.join_link_endpoint: PASSED - Returns teacher's CURRENT recitation_link from their profile
verified_features.admin_update_teacher_link: PASSED - Admin can update a teacher's recitation_link
verified_features.link_propagation_to_sessions: PASSED - When admin updates teacher link, pending sessions are also updated
verified_features.auto_redirect: PASSED - LiveClassroom auto-redirects to Google Meet using window.open(link, '_self')
verified_features.fallback_button: PASSED - Uses native <a> tag with href={meetLink} target='_blank'
verified_features.url_normalization: PASSED - normalizeUrl helper prepends https:// if missing
verified_features.error_state: PASSED - Shows error message when no recitation_link is set for teacher
verified_features.no_hardcoded_links: PASSED - No hardcoded Google Meet links in frontend source files
